summary: A 4-day relaxing getaway to Tokyo, focusing on cultural landmarks, leisure strolls, and mid-range comfort within a budget of HKD 5,000 to 20,000.

morning.name: Arrival at Narita Airport
morning.description: Arrive and take the Skyliner to Central Tokyo.

afternoon.name: Check-in and Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
afternoon.description: Relaxing stroll through one of Tokyo's largest and most popular parks.

evening.name: Dinner in Shinjuku
evening.description: Casual dinner at a local izakaya.

morning.name: Meiji Jingu Shrine
morning.description: A peaceful walk through the forested grounds of Tokyo's most famous Shinto shrine.

afternoon.name: Omotesando Exploration
afternoon.description: Leisurely window shopping and cafe hopping in the 'Champs-Élysées' of Tokyo.

evening.name: Shibuya Crossing and Dinner
evening.description: Witness the famous scramble crossing and enjoy a mid-range sushi dinner.

morning.name: Senso-ji Temple
morning.description: Exploring the ancient Buddhist temple in Asakusa.

afternoon.name: Sumida River Cruise
afternoon.description: A relaxing boat ride from Asakusa to Odaiba with views of the skyline.

evening.name: Odaiba Seaside Park
evening.description: Watching the sunset over the Rainbow Bridge and dinner at the waterfront.

morning.name: Ueno Park Museums
morning.description: A slow morning visiting the Tokyo National Museum or walking by the Shinobazu Pond.

afternoon.name: Last Minute Souvenirs at Ameyoko
afternoon.description: A quick walk through the bustling market street for snacks and gifts.

evening.name: Departure for Narita
evening.description: Take the Skyliner back for the flight home.

weather_summary: Mild and pleasant spring weather with temperatures ranging from 15°C to 23°C. Perfect for outdoor strolls.
